entity.label: Agag
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A king of the Amalekites referred to by Balaam (Num. 24:7). He lived at the time of the Exodus.

nodes.label: Agag
nodes.description: A king of the Amalekites referred to by Balaam (Num. 24:7). He lived at the time of the Exodus.

verses.text: He shall pour the water out of his buckets, and his seed shall be in many waters, and his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.
